summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Job Portal MVP. Backend APIs show 93.3% success rate (14/15 tests passed). Frontend user journeys and UI components working excellently with ~95% success rate. All core features including user registration, authentication, job browsing, job applications, and employer functionality are working properly.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error - Razorpay API integration issue

passed_tests: User registration for learner, employer, and admin roles
JWT authentication and login with proper role-based redirects
Learner profile management with completion calculation
Job creation and employer analytics dashboard
Job browsing with search and filter functionality
Job details page with complete information display
Frontend navigation and UI component responsiveness
Backend CRUD operations for users, jobs, applications
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Razorpay payment order creation API - backend returns 500 error likely due to Razorpay service configuration or API key issues. All other core functionality is working excellently.
